title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:maxItems
text:
Description:
Indicates that a list field has a limit on its size.
Stability Level:
Stable
Payload:
<non-negative integer>
: This field must be no more than X items long.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:maxItems=5
MyList
[]
string
`json:"myList"`
}
In this example,
MyList
cannot contain more than 5 items.
